rationale: The platform requires a futuristic theme with vibrant accents serving Indian financial professionals. To maintain trust while feeling cutting-edge, we use a deep obsidian/midnight blue base (Archetype 5) coupled with vibrant neon cyan and mint accents (Archetype 7). This provides a premium 'High-Tech Trust' aesthetic. It supports Light/Dark/System toggles.

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use p-8 to p-12 for major containers. Ensure containers with borders have internal padding.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Marketing grids: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with gap-8. Dashboard grids: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Mobile-first approach. Use optical alignment for items containing icons next to text.

surface_strategies.marketing_pages: Use Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 or bg-black/60) for sticky elements. Use Tracing Beam effect for pricing tables.
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Use flat solid surfaces, 1px subtle border, and soft ambient hover shadows (-translate-y-1 on hover).
surface_strategies.hover_states: Always explicitly define hover text colors to prevent inheritance issues.

motion_and_interactions.animations: Framer motion for staggered bento grid entrance and smooth transition effects.
motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Smooth momentum scrolling for the marketing landing page.

components.marketing: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for complex layout structures and bento grids. Customize Shadcn for interactive pieces.
components.dashboard: Heavily utilize Shadcn tables, charts, cards, and forms. Adapt them to fit the vibrant accent aesthetic.
components.icons: Use lucide-react. Add @phosphor-icons/react if high-end duotone is needed for marketing sections.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for standard text. Utilize drop shadows when text overlaps complex images.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs) MUST have a data-testid attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='audit-form-submit').

hero_background.description: Abstract glowing data streaks on dark background, ideal for the futuristic marketing hero.

compliance_feature.description: Abstract geometric shape with neon glow to visually represent the AI audit process.

dashboard_mockup.description: Dark mode workspace image to frame or support dashboard section features.

testimonial.description: Portrait of an Indian financial professional for testimonials or use cases.

company_logo_placeholder.description: Clean minimal placeholder suitable for rendering partner or regulatory logos.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'next-themes' or manually manage the Light/Dark/System state on the root element. Map the CSS variables to switch based on the .dark class.
Use .jsx / .js extensions for React components. Do NOT use .tsx.
Add font imports for Outfit (headings) and Manrope (body) via Google Fonts in index.css.
Integrate 'framer-motion' for complex animations on the marketing page, like hover effects and bento grid stagger entries.
For the Website Audit Tool, build a multi-step animated progress state before revealing the final score to simulate a deep scan.
Build the multi-step onboarding wizard using Shadcn forms, and persist data in state before submission.
All interactive elements MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='audit-submit-btn').
Never use placeholder image URLs (like via.placeholder). Always use the provided media URLs.
